response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel source modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all essential for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like projects (e.g., Voice, DSW)
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education (workshops, libraries)
concerns: No proven C or embedded firmware development experience for network switches
No knowledge or experience with required security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement for the role
